element_introduction_order.element: Soda bubble attack (throw in any direction)
Cling/climb mechanic (jump in front of objects to attach)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Vertical space navigation and puzzle solving
Progressive challenge scaling - collection counts increase throughout game
Combat avoidance and tactical bubble throwing
Primary objective - requires collected Spot quota

typical_relief_triggers: Entering bonus stage after level completion
typical_tension_triggers: Spot collection requirement not yet met
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating - collection requirements and obstacle complexity increase as game progresses; time limit creates constant pressure; mix of exploration/collection phases with combat/hazard avoidance peaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus stages accessible only after meeting collection quotas; hidden Continue letters within bonus stages encourage thorough exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Letters spelling UNCOLA hidden in bonus stages; complete word collection grants continues

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with basic jumping, bubble attacks, and modest Spot collection quotas; safe learning environment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of cling/climb mechanics, environmental hazards, enemy projectiles, and increasing collection requirements; checkpoint system supports longer level designs
difficulty_curve.late_game: High collection quotas, complex obstacle combinations, tighter time pressure, sophisticated enemy patterns; mastery of all mechanics required
notable_spikes: First introduction of environmental hazards (immediate threat shift from enemies only)
First cling/climb sequences over pits or hazards (mechanic complexity spike)
Rapid increase in Spot collection quotas mid-game progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level requires collecting a specific number of Spots distributed throughout the level before accessing the cage rescue objective; quotas increase progressively
Levels divided into segments via flagpole checkpoints, allowing players to restart from checkpoints rather than level start upon death
Multi-stage climbing/clinging sequences requiring mastery of attach mechanic while navigating hazards and enemies
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-late levels where cling mechanic is emphasized

notable_level_patterns.description: Optional high-difficulty challenge stages unlocked after successful level completion; contain hidden collectibles (Continue letters)
